description: A hero that fills the whole viewport on a near-black background. The headline is set in a condensed sans-serif at a very large size, roughly two-thirds of the screen height, and bleeds past both the left and right edges so the letters are clipped at each end. It sits in three left-aligned lines; a small caption sits in the lower-right corner. On load, each character slides up from below with a staggered delay, revealed through a mask. As the page scrolls, the whole headline drifts upward slower than the scroll for a depth effect and fades out. Mechanism: characters are split and revealed with a staggered timeline, then a scrubbed scroll trigger drives the parallax and fade.
retrieval_probes: dark editorial hero, text reveals letter by letter on load
oversized headline hero that bleeds off the edges
full-bleed kinetic typography hero with scroll parallax
minimal text-only hero, no images, dark background

text.note: 3 lines, each line <= 12 chars; more than 4 words breaks the layout
